name: california-alpine
description: Alpine County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Alpine County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Alpine County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Alpine County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Alpine County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Alpine County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-alpine-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-alpine-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page is a single record detail view for the Board of Supervisors, indicated by the page ID '176' in hidden inputs.
Representative data is likely contained within the main content area inside the 'bodyContainerTS' or 'mainWrapTS' divs.
Photo URLs are relative paths starting with '/ImageRepository/Document?documentID=' which require base URL absolutization.
The detail URL is derived from the current page context or the 'href' attribute of the main navigation link for this section.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Alpine County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Alpine County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Alpine County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Alpine County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — Alpine is tiny (pop ~1,100); no dedicated NetFile or local portal found. Uses CA SOS as fallback.
